name: P:GTA.NaturalMotion.HighFallHelper.BodyStiffness
summary: Stiffness of body. Value feeds through to bodyBalance (synced with defaults), to armsWindmill (14 for this value at default ), legs pedal, head look and roll down stairs directly.
remarks:
Default value = 11.0f.
            Min value = 6.0f.
            Max value = 16.0f.
